title: ArchiveIndex
description: Rolling index of archived FORTIFYOS Macro Intel daily logs (archive-index.json). Ordered most-recent first. Maximum 90 entries.

ArchiveIndexItem.description: Summary metadata for a single archived day.

date.description: ISO date string for the archived day.

regimeMode.description: Most common regime mode for the day (derived from all entries in the day's log).

dominantDrivers.description: De-duplicated list of dominant driver strings from all entries (max 5).

entryCount.description: Number of NarrativeEntry records in the archived daily log.

archivePath.description: Absolute file system path to the archived YYYY-MM-DD.json file.

archivedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when finalize_day() ran for this date.
